heading: Auditability of certain elements of the intelligence community
label: 3108 Auditability of certain elements of the intelligence community

children.heading: Requirement for annual audits
children.label: a Requirement for annual audits
children.text: The head of each covered entity shall ensure that there is a full financial audit of such covered entity each year beginning with fiscal year 2014. Such audits may be conducted by an internal or external independent accounting or auditing organization.

children.heading: Requirement for unqualified opinion
children.label: b Requirement for unqualified opinion
children.text: Beginning as early as practicable, but in no event later than the audit required under subsection (a) for fiscal year 2016, the head of each covered entity shall take all reasonable steps necessary to ensure that each audit required under subsection (a) contains an unqualified opinion on the financial statements of such covered entity for the fiscal year covered by such audit.

children.heading: Reports to Congress
children.label: c Reports to Congress
children.text: The chief financial officer of each covered entity shall provide to the congressional intelligence committees an annual audit report from an accounting or auditing organization on each audit of the covered entity conducted pursuant to subsection (a).

children.heading: Covered entity defined
children.label: d Covered entity defined
children.text: In this section, the term “covered entity” means the Office of the Director of National Intelligence, the Central Intelligence Agency, the Defense Intelligence Agency, the National Security Agency, the National Reconnaissance Office, and the National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency.
